author: nc1234
content: I think it has something to do with ProposerPreferences is not correctly parsed in buildoor. I think you need to update https://github.com/ethpandaops/buildoor/blob/47bd02d9ad599ddb4959ff9703c177885ccaa617/pkg/proposerpreferences/service.go#L106 to use targetGasLimit

author: bharath.vedartham
content: this is fine, the SSE event json for proposer preferences marshalls targetGasLimit to gasLimit. That event is my custom impl which will change here

author: bharath.vedartham
content: i think lodestar just needs to update their gas limit check and things will be fine

author: tuyen4818
content:
also got this error in a lodestar-only kurtosis test 
```
time="2026-05-21T08:59:06Z" level=warning msg="Failed to parse proposer_preferences event JSON" component=cl-client data="{\"data\":{\"message\":{\"dependent_root\":\"0xd0ad8b526eabfb8fd41bb627794da9b03b6c4982c7afcd70b7516d3cd409ecf4\",\"proposal_slot\":\"55\",\"validator_index\":\"185\",\"fee_recipient\":\"0x8943545177806ED17B9F23F0a21ee5948eCaa776\",\"target_gas_limit\":\"150000000\"},\"signature\":\"0x9956753f23c6cdfdd9cd1cd7c7cc8849b80f656db3c7c019aa274d0331f69956a1aa34ca184206baa1f176f10eab4a0e18fa2c178a3fb61a117823b122a2a63fc120e8b6db8af3a462027f1a1870d3f35d79606f9bdfb8fe6543ffbb9293ea6e\"},\"version\":\"gloas\"}" error="invalid JSON: gas limit missing"
```

I think buildoor should follow beacon api to parse `targetGasLimit` instead of `gasLimit` https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/blob/proposer-preferences-apis/apis/eventstream/index.yaml#L196

author: bharath.vedartham
content: yeah i think the naming is different here

author: bharath.vedartham
content: i will parse the gas limit as targetGasLimit, that is the correct one anyways
